testcase.name: test_crud_news_full_cycle
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_comprehensive_crud_audit.py:401: in test_crud_news_full_cycle assert response.status_code == 200, f"Update failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Update failed: {"detail":"News not found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
